title: Audit OpenClaw parity status (N4-N12)

context.objective: Assess completion status of OpenClaw parity nodes N4-N12
context.background: PARITY_PLAN.md shows N0-N3 complete. Need to evaluate N4-N12 against a2r-openclaw-host native implementations.
nodes_to_audit: N5: Native chat + stream + abort + inject
N6: Native channels + QR + config patch
N8: Native skills + nodes + exec approvals

outputs.description: Detailed status of each parity node with completion %
Updated parity plan with current status

acceptance_criteria: Review all native_*.rs files in a2r-openclaw-host
Map each file to parity node N4-N12
Assess completion percentage for each node
